Tutorial

Using a Mouse

In the following activities you will learn how to use a mouse; how to click, double-click, right-click, and drag and drop.

These activities are completely separate to anything else on the computer, you cannot break anything, so it doesn't matter if you make a mistake and there is no harm done if you do.

If you want to try a section again, you can use the next section and previous section buttons to go back or forward to it. You can try each section as many times as you like.

Start Tutorial →
